x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Monitoring Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks real-time and historical positions of assets (e.g., cash, securities) and liabilities (e.g., loans, derivatives).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Aggregation Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Consolidates positions across multiple accounts, products, currencies, or business units.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Valuation & Mark-to-Market Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Updates positions based on current market values to reflect accurate exposure and portfolio value.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exposure & Risk Tracking Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Measures financial exposure, including credit, market, and liquidity risks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction Impact Tracking Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reflects how transactions (trades, payments, settlements) affect positions over time.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reconciliation & Accuracy Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures positions match records from trading systems, custody, and accounting systems.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reporting & Analytics Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides reports on positions, exposures, performance, and trends for decision-making and compliance.
